ptzCameras.notes: 1/2.8-inch 4K Exmor CMOS, 12x. Dual-lens auto-tracking system: main PTZ lens specs only. Panoramic tracking module is a tracking sensor, not a recording lens; out of scope. HFOV 70°/6° from AVer datasheet. Focal range 3.9–46.8mm. Sensor dimensions: industry-standard for 1/2.8-inch (manufacturer does not publish mm). NDI|HX optional license upgrade. Current.

1/2.8-inch Full HD Exmor CMOS, 30x. HFOV 62.3°/2.5° from AVer datasheet PDF (DFOV 69.2°/2.8° also published). Focal range 4.5–135mm. Sensor dimensions: industry-standard for 1/2.8-inch (manufacturer does not publish mm). averusa.com datasheet PDF. Current.

1/2.8-inch 4K Exmor CMOS, 12x. NDI-native variant of PTZ310UV2; optics identical. HFOV 72.1°/6.3° from AVer datasheet PDF (DFOV 79.2°/7.5° also published). Focal range 3.9–46.8mm. Sensor dimensions: industry-standard for 1/2.8-inch (manufacturer does not publish mm). averusa.com datasheet PDF. Current.
4K 60fps, 1/2.8-inch 4K Exmor CMOS 8MP, 12x. AVer publishes HFOV/VFOV/DFOV separately: HFOV 72.1°/6.3°, DFOV 79.2°/7.5°. Focal range 3.9–46.8mm. averusa.com/products/ptz-camera/ptz310uv2. Current.

Same optical module as PTZ330UV2; adds NDI|HX3 native. 1/2.8-inch 4K Exmor CMOS 8MP, 30x. HFOV 62.3°/2.5° from AVer product page. Focal range 4.5–135mm. presentation.aver.com/model/ptz330unv2. Current.
4K 60fps, 1/2.8-inch 4K Exmor CMOS 8MP, 30x. AVer publishes HFOV/VFOV/DFOV separately: HFOV 62.3°/2.5°, DFOV 69.2°/2.8°. Focal range 4.5–135mm. averusa.com/products/ptz-camera/ptz330uv2. Current.

1/2.8-inch CMOS, 12x. HFOV 70°/6° from AVer datasheet PDF. Focal range 3.9–46.8mm. Sensor dimensions: industry-standard for 1/2.8-inch (manufacturer does not publish mm). averusa.com datasheet PDF. Current.

1/2.8-inch CMOS, 12x. HFOV 70°/6° from AVer datasheet PDF. Focal range 3.9–46.8mm. Sensor dimensions: industry-standard for 1/2.8-inch (manufacturer does not publish mm). averusa.com datasheet PDF. Current.

1/2.8-inch CMOS, 12x. NDI variant of TR315. HFOV 70°/6° from AVer datasheet PDF. Focal range 3.9–46.8mm. Sensor dimensions: industry-standard for 1/2.8-inch (manufacturer does not publish mm). averusa.com datasheet PDF. Current.

1/2.8-inch CMOS, 30x. HFOV 62.3°/2.5° from averusa.com product page. Note: AVer publishes focal range 3.9–46.8mm with 30x optical zoom; these values are mutually inconsistent (3.9mm × 30 ≠ 46.8mm). Optically-equivalent TR335N publishes 4.5–135mm/30x which is consistent; the focal range on averusa.com for TR335 appears to be a data error. HFOV 62.3°/2.5° is consistent across sources and is the app-critical value. Current.

1/2.8-inch 4K Exmor CMOS, 30x. NDI HX3 variant. HFOV 62.3°/2.5° from AVer datasheet (DFOV 69.2°/2.8° also published). Focal range 4.5–135mm. Sensor dimensions: industry-standard for 1/2.8-inch (manufacturer does not publish mm). averusa.com datasheet PDF. Current.

1/2.8-inch 4K Exmor CMOS, 30x. Main PTZ lens. Dual-camera system: TR535 includes a secondary 105° HFOV wide-angle module used for auto-tracking (not an independent PTZ recording lens; out of scope). HFOV 62.3°/2.5° from AVer brochure. Focal range 4.5–135mm. Sensor dimensions: industry-standard for 1/2.8-inch (manufacturer does not publish mm). Current.

1/2.8-inch 4K Exmor CMOS, 30x. NDI HX3 variant of TR535. HFOV 62.3°/2.5° from AVer datasheet PDF. Focal range 4.5–135mm. Sensor dimensions: industry-standard for 1/2.8-inch (manufacturer does not publish mm). averusa.com datasheet PDF. Current.

1-inch 4K Sony Exmor RS CMOS, 19x optical zoom. HFOV 69.5°/3.5° from AVer datasheet PDF (DFOV 77.8°/4.5° also published). Focal range 9.79–186.39mm. Sensor dimensions: industry-standard for 1-inch (manufacturer does not publish mm). Dual 12G-SDI outputs. PoE++. averusa.com datasheet PDF. Current.
